offer_impression_count.name: Offer Impression Count
offer_impression_count.definition: Total number of times an offer creative was rendered in a user-visible surface (store listing, notification, in-app banner). Deduplicated per user per session; a user seeing the same offer twice in one session counts as one impression.
offer_impression_count.caveats: Impressions from preloaded but never-viewed surfaces (e.g., below-fold cards) are excluded. Client-side dedup may undercount on slow networks.

offer_ctr.name: Offer Click-Through Rate
offer_ctr.definition: Ratio of unique offer clicks to unique offer impressions within the same attribution window (default 24h).
offer_ctr.business_logic: CTR = offer_clicks / offer_impression_count. Only primary CTA taps count; dismiss or swipe-away actions are excluded.

offer_redemption_rate.name: Offer Redemption Rate
offer_redemption_rate.definition: Fraction of users who clicked an offer and subsequently completed the required action (purchase, install, subscription) within the attribution window.
offer_redemption_rate.business_logic: Redemption Rate = offer_redemption_count / offer_clicks. Multi-step offers (e.g., "install and make a purchase") require all steps completed.

offer_redemption_count.name: Offer Redemption Count
offer_redemption_count.definition: Absolute number of completed offer redemptions in the period. Each user-offer pair counts at most once per offer campaign.

offer_driven_revenue.name: Offer-Driven Revenue
offer_driven_revenue.definition: Total gross revenue (before Play Store commission) directly attributed to redeemed offers, measured within 7 days of redemption.
offer_driven_revenue.business_logic: Sum of transaction amounts where the purchase event has a valid offer_redemption_id foreign key and occurred within the 7-day post-redemption attribution window.

offer_cost.name: Offer Cost
offer_cost.definition: Total cost of offer incentives disbursed (discounts granted, Play Points awarded, cashback paid) for redeemed offers in the period.

offer_roi.name: Offer ROI
offer_roi.definition: Return on investment for offer spend, computed as incremental revenue divided by offer cost.
offer_roi.business_logic: ROI = (offer_driven_revenue - offer_cost) / offer_cost. Values above 1.0 indicate profitable offers. Incremental revenue is estimated via a holdout-based lift model when available; otherwise gross attribution is used with a documented caveat.
offer_roi.caveats: ROI without holdout correction overstates true lift by 15-40% depending on offer type and audience overlap.

avg_time_to_redemption.name: Average Time to Redemption
avg_time_to_redemption.definition: Mean elapsed time (in hours) between a user's first impression of an offer and the completed redemption event.
avg_time_to_redemption.caveats: Outliers beyond 168h (7 days) are capped at 168h to prevent skew. Median is often a better summary statistic for this metric.

wau.name: Weekly Active Users
wau.definition: Count of unique users who opened any Play Store surface (main app, in-app billing, Play Games) at least once in a rolling 7-day window.

dau.name: Daily Active Users
dau.definition: Count of unique users who opened any Play Store surface at least once on a given calendar day (market-local timezone).

d7_retention.name: Day-7 Retention
d7_retention.definition: Fraction of users who installed an app on day 0 and returned to use it on day 7 (calendar-day based, market-local timezone).

d30_retention.name: Day-30 Retention
d30_retention.definition: Fraction of users who installed an app on day 0 and returned to use it on day 30 (calendar-day based, market-local timezone).

revenue_per_user.name: Revenue Per User (ARPU)
revenue_per_user.definition: Average gross revenue per active user in the period, computed as total revenue divided by the count of unique active users.

ltv_30d.name: 30-Day Lifetime Value
ltv_30d.definition: Predicted cumulative revenue from a user cohort over 30 days from install, using a survival-model-based projection calibrated on historical cohorts.
ltv_30d.caveats: LTV projections for cohorts younger than 14 days have wide confidence intervals. Use d7-based estimates with explicit uncertainty bands.

sessions_per_user.name: Sessions Per User
sessions_per_user.definition: Average number of app sessions per active user per day. A session starts on app foreground and ends after 30 minutes of inactivity or app background.

avg_session_duration.name: Average Session Duration
avg_session_duration.definition: Mean session length in minutes across all active users in the period.

play_points_earn_rate.name: Play Points Earn Rate
play_points_earn_rate.definition: Average Play Points earned per active Play Points member per week, across all earning channels (purchases, quests, check-in bonuses).

play_points_burn_rate.name: Play Points Burn Rate
play_points_burn_rate.definition: Average Play Points redeemed (burned) per active Play Points member per week. Includes coupon redemptions, in-app item exchanges, and Play Store credit conversions.
play_points_burn_rate.caveats: Burn rate spikes during promotional events (e.g., 2x redemption weeks) can distort weekly averages. Use median or exclude promo periods for trend analysis.

play_points_balance_avg.name: Play Points Average Balance
play_points_balance_avg.definition: Mean outstanding Play Points balance across all enrolled members at period end.
play_points_balance_avg.caveats: High average balances may indicate poor burn incentives or UX friction in the redemption flow. Monitor in conjunction with burn rate.

loyalty_driven_purchases.name: Loyalty-Driven Purchases
loyalty_driven_purchases.definition: Count of purchase transactions where the user applied Play Points credit or redeemed a Play Points coupon as part of the payment.

store_visit_to_install_rate.name: Store Visit to Install Rate
store_visit_to_install_rate.definition: Conversion rate from unique store listing page views to completed installs within a 24-hour window.

install_to_first_purchase_rate.name: Install to First Purchase Rate
install_to_first_purchase_rate.definition: Fraction of users who made at least one in-app purchase or subscription within 30 days of install.

offer_funnel_conversion.name: Offer Funnel Conversion
offer_funnel_conversion.definition: End-to-end conversion rate from offer impression to completed redemption, combining CTR and redemption rate into a single metric.
offer_funnel_conversion.business_logic: offer_funnel_conversion = offer_ctr * offer_redemption_rate. This is a composite metric for executive dashboards; drill into CTR and redemption rate separately for diagnostics.

subscription_conversion_rate.name: Subscription Conversion Rate
subscription_conversion_rate.definition: Fraction of active free users who convert to a paid subscription (new subscriptions / active free users) within the reporting period.

churn_rate.name: Churn Rate
churn_rate.definition: Fraction of users active in the prior period who did not return in the current period (monthly basis). Includes both voluntary churn (uninstall) and passive churn (inactivity > 30 days).
churn_rate.caveats: Churn definition varies by vertical. Games typically use 7-day inactivity windows; subscription apps use billing cancellation. This metric uses the 30-day inactivity standard for cross-category comparability.
